penalties.description: Maximum time reached without visible completion of tail cutting inside the trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task at maximum time, while GPT reported completion at 75 seconds with unsecured loop penalty. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was completed, and Claude's specific observation that tail cutting was not visible, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence as it represents a more conservative evaluation of task completion.
